name: Taisho Pharmaceutical Holdings Co., Ltd.
description: Taisho Pharmaceutical Holdings Co., Ltd. is a Japan-based company principally engaged in the manufacturing and sale of over-the-counter (OTC) drugs and prescription pharmaceuticals. The company is a leading player in the Japanese OTC drug market, offering a wide range of products including energy drinks, cold remedies, hair growth treatments, and gastrointestinal medications. It also develops and markets prescription pharmaceuticals in therapeutic areas such as infectious diseases, orthopedic disorders, and metabolic diseases, both domestically and internationally.
